Love, trust, and apologies only have meaning when they are backed by consistent effort.

Attraction may start a relationship, but effort is what keeps it alive. This message is about relationship advice, mutual effort, emotional investment, communication, healthy relationships, and commitment. No matter how attractive, successful, or confident someone is, a lasting connection requires both people to show interest, appreciation, and consistent effort. Real relationships grow when both sides choose each other every day.

text:
Ever find yourself exhausted from trying to get somebody else to change?
 
It makes sense... When you love someone, you want things to get better. You want the relationship to work.
 
But you can't heal for them. You can't choose for them. You can't do their work for them.
 
You can control whether you tell the truth. Whether you set boundaries. Whether you become someone you’re proud to be.
 
And that’s not giving up. That’s taking your life back.
 
Delony

#relationship #relationshipadvice #relationshipproblems

text:
Rule Number One For Maintaining A Healthy Relationship

www.InstantID.info

Keeping in touch with exes or people who once had feelings for you is a recipe for disaster in a committed partnership. True respect for your relationship means closing the door on the past to ensure that you are giving one hundred percent to your future together.
